post.summary:
Mint a single-use `state` token for the app-manifest web flow. The UI builds
the manifest JSON client-side and form-POSTs it to
`{html_url}/settings/apps/new?state={state}`; GitHub then redirects to
[`redirect`], which consumes this state to resolve the team + app.

ApiErrorBody.description: Error envelope returned by every failing endpoint (contract C5).

token.description: The plaintext token — shown exactly once.

github_app_uuid.description: uuid of the GitHub App source (required when `source = "github_app"`).

is_private.description: Informational flag for a GitHub App source (private vs public repo).

private_key_uuid.description: uuid of a private key to clone over SSH as a raw deploy key.

source.description:
Git source discriminator: `github_app` to deploy a private repo via a
GitHub App source. Omit for a public/`git@`/`file://` clone.

s3_storage_uuid.description: Empty string detaches the S3 storage; omitted leaves it unchanged.

token.description: The plaintext API token — stored encrypted, never returned.

ssh_hostname.description:
The tunnel's public SSH hostname (Coolify: `ssh_domain`). Once the tunnel
is healthy the server's `ip` is repointed at this hostname so subsequent
ssh connections dial `cloudflared access ssh --hostname <this>`.

tunnel_token.description: The Cloudflare tunnel token to run the agent with.

image.description: Overrides the engine's default image when set.

value.description: Null once a shown-once variable has been persisted.

private_key_uuid.description: uuid of an existing private key holding the App's RSA PEM.

GithubAppDto.description: A GitHub App as returned by the API (secrets elided).

private_key_uuid.description: Optional SSH key to install/connect with; defaults to the team's first.

state.description:
Single-use `state` token to embed in the app-manifest form POST; the
redirect handler consumes it to resolve the team + app.

MetricsStatus.description:
Freshness of a server's metrics collection: the newest host sample time and
whether it is stale per [`rustify_deploy::metrics::is_stale`].

last_seen.description: ISO-8601 Zulu timestamp of the newest host sample, or `null` if none.

stale.description: True when no sample is newer than the staleness threshold.

NotificationSettingsDto.description:
Read view: channel toggles, non-secret config, secret presence flags, and the
event matrix. No secret value is ever included.

NotificationSettingsUpdate.description:
Partial update. Secret fields are write-only: `null`/absent leaves them
unchanged, `""` clears them, and any other value (re-)encrypts and stores it.

PreviewDto.description: A PR preview as returned by the API.

PrivateKeyDto.description: A private key as returned by the API (private material elided).

role.description: The requesting user's role in this team, when known.

tags.name: metrics
tags.description: Server and container metrics time series

tags.name: cloud
tags.description: Cloud provider tokens and Hetzner provisioning
